title: Monday integration with TheBat
excerpt:
Hi, 
Will someone integrate TheBat e-mail program (https://www.ritlabs.com/) with Monday? 
Krzysztof

posts.author: atic (Krzysztof Smoliński)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Will someone integrate TheBat e-mail program (https://www.ritlabs.com/) with Monday?
Krzysztof

posts.author: OliverChrome (Oliver Crombach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @atic,
I am happy to scope out what kind of integration you are looking for and bring in our CTO to discuss what is possible based on the API and needed for your organisation.
You can reach me via mail oliver@jtscloud.com (we are the APAC Partner of the year 2020). The initial scoping call is complimentary.
Talk to you soon!
Ollie
